TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-mou-avang, ni-mou-arough mou-qua tou æuma tyn. Ka kytt'ei ni-mad tyni-æn ki dimmi-dimmi-en ka malaliko tou'æpag-hin.
Irou ka ni-mou-avang, ni-mou-arough mou-qua tou æuma tyn. Ka kytt'ei ni-mad tyni-æn ki dimmi-dimmi-en ka malaliko tou'æpag-hin.
S.TRANSL: Ende in het schip gegat Hnde boer hy obe? ende quam in sijne ctadt. Ende siet sy brachten tot hem eenen gheraeckten op een bedde liggende.
And he entered into a ship, and passed over, and came into his own city.
耶穌上了船，渡過海，來到自己的城裏。

S.FORM: Heirou ka katytt'en ti Jesus ta tnamfing-an nein, ni-k'ma ki dimmi-dimmi-en-da, Pæh-shut-â æpak, atta-ral-en-kow ki varau.
Heirou ka katytt'en ti Jesus ta tnamfing-an nein, ni-k'ma ki dimmi-dimmi-en-da, Pæh-shut-â æpak, atta-ral-en-kow ki varau.
S.TRANSL: Jesus haer geloobe fiende sepde tot den geraeckten &one zijt wel gemoet uwe londen zijn u bergeben.
And, behold, they brought to him a man sick of the palsy, lying on a bed: and Jesus seeing their faith said unto the sick of the palsy; Son, be of good cheer; thy sins be forgiven thee.
有人用褥子抬着一個癱子到耶穌跟前來。耶穌見他們的信心，就對癱子說：「小子，放心吧！你的罪赦了。」

S.FORM: Ka k'ytt'ei ta rarouma ki Makou-sasoulat ni-mattai-rarÿhda, Barigh mahkou-talum ta ti atta [ki Alid.]
Ka k'ytt'ei ta rarouma ki Makou-sasoulat ni-mattai-rarÿhda, Barigh mahkou-talum ta ti atta [ki Alid.]
S.TRANSL: Ende siet fommighe der Schaiftgeleerde sepden in hae selben Dese lastert [Godt.]
And, behold, certain of the scribes said within themselves, This man blasphemeth.
有幾個文士心裏說：「這個人說僭妄的話了。」

S.FORM: Ka dou kmytta ta ti Jesus ki na pæh-darimdini nein, ni-k'ma, Ka oumang pah-fammuk-kamou pæh-dimdim tou rÿh-oumi?
Ka dou kmytta ta ti Jesus ki na pæh-darimdini nein, ni-k'ma, Ka oumang pah-fammuk-kamou pæh-dimdim tou rÿh-oumi?
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus siende hare gedachten sepde Waerom oberdenckt ghy quaet in uwe herten r.
And Jesus knowing their thoughts said, Wherefore think ye evil in your hearts?
耶穌知道他們的心意，就說：「你們為甚麼心裏懷着惡念呢？

S.FORM: Ka mang ta masaoun assi mahougfpit ka sou, Atta-ral-en kow ki varau; ki pou-sou-en lava, 'Æhpit-â, mou-naunang-â?
Ka mang ta masaoun assi mahougfpit ka sou, Atta-ral-en kow ki varau; ki pou-sou-en lava, 'Æhpit-â, mou-naunang-â?
S.TRANSL: Want wat is lichtelicKer te seggen De sonden zijn y bergeben : ofte te seggen Staet op ende wandelts
For whether is easier, to say, Thy sins be forgiven thee; or to say, Arise, and walk?
或說『你的罪赦了』，或說『你起來行走』，哪一樣容易呢？

S.FORM: Ka alei ka moumha-ah-ka-mou, ka akou-keirang-en ki kailh-en ta Alak ki kaeuloung tou atta-ral-han ki varau tou Næi-râ (nda ni-k'ma tou dimmi-dimmi-en) Æhpittâ, arau ta æpag-in-oho, d'marang-â mouqua tou tallagh-oho.

Ka alei ka moumha-ah-ka-mou, ka akou-keirang-en ki kailh-en ta Alak ki kaeuloung tou atta-ral-han ki varau tou Næi-râ (nda ni-k'ma tou dimmi-dimmi-en) Æhpittâ, arau ta æpag-in-oho, d'marang-â mouqua tou tallagh-oho.
S.TRANSL: Doch op dat ghy mooght weten dat de Sone des menschen macht heeft op der aerden desonden te bergeben doe sepde hy tot den geraeckten) Staet op neemt uw' bedde op ende gaet henen na uw' huys. .
But that ye may know that the Son of man hath power on earth to forgive sins, (then saith he to the sick of the palsy,) Arise, take up thy bed, and go unto thine house.
但要叫你們知道，人子在地上有赦罪的權柄」；就對癱子說：「起來！拿你的褥子回家去吧。」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-æhpit, ni-dmarang mouqua tou tallagh tyn.
Ka rou ni-æhpit, ni-dmarang mouqua tou tallagh tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ed hy opgeltaen zijnde ging henen na ijn huys.
And he arose, and departed to his house.
那人就起來，回家去了。

S.FORM: Irou ka kakytt'an [ta atta] ki Makoilalaulau, ni-mou rynghau ka ni-paka-irang ki kidi ki Alid, ka ni-piha ki keirang-en ki kailh-hen ka k'ma-hynna ki kaeuloung-da.
Irou ka kakytt'an [ta atta] ki Makoilalaulau, ni-mou rynghau ka ni-paka-irang ki kidi ki Alid, ka ni-piha ki keirang-en ki kailh-hen ka k'ma-hynna ki kaeuloung-da.
S.TRANSL: De icharen nu [dat] siende hebben haer berwondert ende Godt berheerlickt die soodanighe macht den menschen gegeben hadde on
But when the multitudes saw it, they marvelled, and glorified God, which had given such power unto men.
眾人看見都驚奇，就歸榮耀與上帝，因為他將這樣的權柄賜給人。 （可2‧13－17；路5‧27－32）

S.FORM: Ka tou hali-daeu-en ti Jesus hynna, ni-kmytta ki voual ka miroung tou tallagh ki'ahimhgan, ka ti Mattheus ki nanang: ka nik'ma tyni-æn, Mææuæug-a jauan. Ka rou ni-æhpit ni-mææuug tyni-æn.
Ka tou hali-daeu-en ti Jesus hynna, ni-kmytta ki voual ka miroung tou tallagh ki'ahimhgan, ka ti Mattheus ki nanang: ka nik'ma tyni-æn, Mææuæug-a jauan. Ka rou ni-æhpit ni-mææuug tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde Jecus ban dae: boort gaende sagh een menche in het Tolhuys sitten genaemt Mattheus: ende fepde tot hem Dolght my, Ende hy opstaende bolghde em.
And as Jesus passed forth from thence, he saw a man, named Matthew, sitting at the receipt of custom: and he saith unto him, Follow me. And he arose, and followed him.
耶穌從那裏往前走，看見一個人名叫馬太，坐在稅關上，就對他說：「你跟從我來。」他就起來跟從了耶穌。

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma'to-hynna dou miroung mavok tou tallagh [ti Mattheus], kytt'ei mabatoung ki tama-imigh ki tama-kavarau-appa ni-iroua ni-sâl ti Jesus-an ki Pæhtatæutæu-en-appa tyn.
Ka ni-k'ma'to-hynna dou miroung mavok tou tallagh [ti Mattheus], kytt'ei mabatoung ki tama-imigh ki tama-kavarau-appa ni-iroua ni-sâl ti Jesus-an ki Pæhtatæutæu-en-appa tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende het-geschiedde als hy in t huys [Matthei] gensat siet bele tollenaers ende sondaers quamen ende saten mede aen met Jelu ende shne Discipelen,
And it came to pass, as Jesus sat at meat in the house, behold, many publicans and sinners came and sat down with him and his disciples.
耶穌在屋裏坐席的時候，有好些稅吏和罪人來，與耶穌和他的門徒一同坐席。

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-kmytta [ki atta] ta Farizéen, ni-k'ma ta neni ki Pæhtatæutæu-en tyn, Kaumang ka mi-sâl mavok ta Tama-mahtatæutæuuh ymoumi-æn ki tamaimuh ki tama-kavarau-râ?
Ka rou ni-kmytta [ki atta] ta Farizéen, ni-k'ma ta neni ki Pæhtatæutæu-en tyn, Kaumang ka mi-sâl mavok ta Tama-mahtatæutæuuh ymoumi-æn ki tamaimuh ki tama-kavarau-râ?
S.TRANSL: Ende de Phariseen [dar] fiende sepden tot [ijns] Discipelen Waerom eet uw' Meelter met de tollenaren ende sondaren
And when the Pharisees saw it, they said unto his disciples, Why eateth your Master with publicans and sinners?
法利賽人看見，就對耶穌的門徒說：「你們的先生為甚麼和稅吏並罪人一同吃飯呢？」

S.FORM: Irou ka millingigh ta ti Jesus [ki atta], ni-k'ma neini-æn, Manga neini-æn ka madarikæh ta tama-simimia ki mâlam, ka dyk alei ki assi mariang ki voual.
Irou ka millingigh ta ti Jesus [ki atta], ni-k'ma neini-æn, Manga neini-æn ka madarikæh ta tama-simimia ki mâlam, ka dyk alei ki assi mariang ki voual.
S.TRANSL: Mae: Jesus [lulcks] hoorende seyde tot haer Die gefont zijn en hebben den Medecijn-meelter niet ban noode mae; die fieck zijn.
But when Jesus heard that, he said unto them, They that be whole need not a physician, but they that are sick.
耶穌聽見，就說：「康健的人用不着醫生，有病的人才用得着。

S.FORM: Ra ouqu'auto papahtæu-tæu-anei, ka mang ta atta, Kaharumman ta kamoei-en-au, assi paphgik-an. Kassi-koh irou-ato ki tætæǣm-au-mau ta matiktik, râ tama-kavarau-appa tou si-lal'an.
Ra ouqu'auto papahtæu-tæu-anei, ka mang ta atta, Kaharumman ta kamoei-en-au, assi paphgik-an. Kassi-koh irou-ato ki tætæǣm-au-mau ta matiktik, râ tama-kavarau-appa tou si-lal'an.
S.TRANSL: Doch gaet henen ende leert wat het 3p Ick wil bamhetrtigheydc ende niet offerande. Want ick ben niet gekomen om te roepen rechtbeerdighe maer sondaers tot bekeeringe.
But go ye and learn what that meaneth, I will have mercy, and not sacrifice: for I am not come to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.
經上說：『我喜愛憐恤，不喜愛祭祀。』這句話的意思，你們且去揣摩。我來本不是召義人，乃是召罪人。」 （可2‧18－22；路5‧33－39）

S.FORM: Tou kidi k'anna ni-irou-a tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutæu-en ti Joannes, koun, K'aumang ka vounavounei-kame mirkit ta emiæn ki Farizeen appa, râ assi mirkit ta Pæhtatæutæu-en-oho?
Tou kidi k'anna ni-iroua tyni-æn ta Pahtatæutæu-en ti Joannes, koun, K'aumang ka vounavounei-kame mirkit ta emiæn ki Farizeen appa, râ assi mirkit ta Pæhtatæutæu-en-oho?
S.TRANSL: Boe quamen de Bisctpelen Joannis tot hem seggende Waerom basten wp ende de Pharileen beel ende nwe uwe Ditcipelen en balten niets
Then came to him the disciples of John, saying, Why do we and the Pharisees fast oft, but thy disciples fast not?
那時，約翰的門徒來見耶穌，說：「我們和法利賽人常常禁食，你的門徒倒不禁食，這是為甚麼呢？」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Hmahei-kaua mavoulas ta Alalak [ka poulalam] ki pæræh ka vahæu, rou ǣ'ia-qua-appa neini-æn ta paræh ka makakakitil [k'anna?] Râ irouah ta wæ'i'j, ka ha-mi-aul-ato ta pæræh ka makakakitil neini-æn, anna ta mirkit-ah ta neini.

Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Hmahei-kaua mavoulas ta Alalak [ka poulalam] ki pæræh ka vahæu, rou ǣ'ia-qua-appa neini-æn ta paræh ka makakakitil [k'anna?] Râ irouah ta wæ'i'j, ka ha-mi-aul-ato ta pæræh ka makakakitil neini-æn, anna ta mirkit-ah ta neini.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus lepde tot haer fionnen oock de Bruylofts-kinderen treuren soo langhe de Bruydegom by hae? 1s Maer de daeghen _ Cullen komen wanneer de Bruydegom ban haer sal wech genomen zijn nde dan sullen sy basten.

And Jesus said unto them, Can the children of the bridechamber mourn, as long as the bridegroom is with them? but the days will come, when the bridegroom shall be taken from them, and then shall they fast.
耶穌對他們說：「新郎和陪伴之人同在的時候，陪伴之人豈能哀慟呢？但日子將到，新郎要離開他們，那時候他們就要禁食。

S.FORM: Aousi ta timamang ka pouh-halap ki apapad ka aousi-appa ki houpyng [kavaæu-appa] tou koula-mough [ka marouhfpa] ka rïé, ka mou-khyt ta na apad ki koulamough, ka mou-darima mou-khyt ta khyt.
Aousi ta timamang ka pouh-halap ki apapad ka aousi-appa ki houpyng [kavaæu-appa] tou koulamough [ka marouhfpa] ka rïé, ka mou-khyt ta na apad ki koulamough, ka mou-darima mou-khyt ta khyt.
S.TRANSL: Oockensetmemandt eenen lap ongebolt laken Sp een oudt kleedt: want des felben aengesette lap chenrt af ban het kleedt ende daer wort een erger scheure, 0
No man putteth a piece of new cloth unto an old garment, for that which is put in to fill it up taketh from the garment, and the rent is made worse.
沒有人把新布補在舊衣服上；因為所補上的反帶壞了那衣服，破的就更大了。

S.FORM: Ka assi pou-quan ta hala [ki karæu matæh] ka vaæu tou vannak ka rii: irou k'ma-hynna, mou-ptou-ak ra vannak, ka pa-ouh-tiri-en ta hala, ka myhkoulei ta vannak: ra pou-qu'an ta hala ki karæumatæh ka vahæu tou vannak ka vahæu, ka rourouha k'anna kasal-in hma pa-i-darie.

Ka assi pou-quan ta hala [ki karæu matæh] ka vaæu tou vannak ka rii: irou k'ma-hynna, mou-ptou-ak ra vannak, ka pa-ouh-tiri-en ta hala, ka myhkoulei ta vannak: ra pou-qu'an ta hala ki karæumatæh ka vahæu tou vannak ka vahæu, ka rourouha k'anna kasal-in hma pa-i-darie.
S.TRANSL: Noch men doet geenen nieuwen wijn in oude [leder-]sacken : anders foo berften de [leder-] sacken ende de wijn wordt uytgeltort ende de [leder-] sacken berderben : maer men doet nieywen wijn in nieuwe [leder ] facken ende beyde te samen worden behouden.
Neither do men put new wine into old bottles: else the bottles break, and the wine runneth out, and the bottles perish: but they put new wine into new bottles, and both are preserved.
也沒有人把新酒裝在舊皮袋裏；若是這樣，皮袋就裂開，酒漏出來，連皮袋也壞了。惟獨把新酒裝在新皮袋裏，兩樣就都保全了。」 （可5‧21－43；路8‧40－56）

S.FORM: Tou pasousou-en tyn neini-æn ki atta, kytt'ei saat ki si-bavau ni-iroua deip tyni-æn, koun, Ni-mapatei 'houni ta alak-au ka Ina, râ ouquâ pouh-halap ki rimauho tyni-æn, ka mæuæh-ah ta teni.
Tou pasousou-en tyn neini-æn ki atta, kytt'ei saat ki si-bavau ni-iroua deip tyni-æn, koun, Ni-mapatei 'houni ta alak-au ka Ina, râ ouquâ pouh-halap ki rimauho tyni-æn, ka mæuæh-ah ta teni.
S.TRANSL: Als hy dese dinghen tot hae: sprack [iet een ] berste quam ende aenbadt hem eggende Mijn dochter is nu teritont geftorben doch komt ende leght uwe handt op hae? ende sy sal leben.
While he spake these things unto them, behold, there came a certain ruler, and worshipped him, saying, My daughter is even now dead: but come and lay thy hand upon her, and she shall live.
耶穌說這話的時候，有一個管會堂的來拜他，說：「我女兒剛才死了，求你去按手在她身上，她就必活了。」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-æhpit ta ti Jesus, ni-mæuæuugh tyni-æn mou-lam ki Pæhtatæutæuuh-en tyn.
Ka rou ni-æhpit ta ti Jesus, ni-mæuæuugh tyni-æn mou-lam ki Pæhtatæutæuuh-en tyn.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde Jesus opgeltaer zijnde bolghde hem ende fyne Disciptlen,
And Jesus arose, and followed him, and so did his disciples.
耶穌便起來跟着他去；門徒也跟了去。

S.FORM: Ka kytt'ei ta Ina ka tæuæmag-han makka-fat kytiæn ab 'ki rouha ki tauil, dou mou-rikour mou-ææugh, ni-smoukla ki na papydpyd ki koulamough tyn.
Ka kytt'ei ta Ina ka tæuæmag-han makka-fat kytiæn ab 'ki rouha ki tauil, dou mou-rikour mou-ææugh, ni-smoukla ki na papydpyd ki koulamough tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende siet een brouwe die twaelf jaeren het blordbloeyen ghehadt hadde komende tot hem ban achteren raeckee den 300m fijnes kleedts aen.
And, behold, a woman, which was diseased with an issue of blood twelve years, came behind him, and touched the hem of his garment:
有一個女人，患了十二年的血漏 ，來到耶穌背後，摸他的衣裳繸子；

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæi-mado tyni-æn, rou sou-dyk-en-au smoukla ki koulamough tyn, dou miaka'ddæ-rikæh-ah-koh.
Ka ni-mattæi-mado tyni-æn, rou sou-dyk-en-au smoukla ki koulamough tyn, dou miaka'ddæ-rikæh-ah-koh.
S.TRANSL: Wanitfpseydein hae? felben indien ick alleentjck syn kleedt aenraecke soo faf ick gesont worden.
For she said within herself, If I may but touch his garment, I shall be whole.
因為她心裏說：「我只摸他的衣裳，就必痊癒。」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-mææuvering ta ti Jesus, ni-kmyta tyni-æn k'ma, Pæhs'hut-â timi, ni-paka-riang ymhou-an ta tnamsingan-oho. Ka ni-padarikæh-in ta Ina na tou kidi ki tælei k'anna.
Ka rou ni-mææuvering ta ti Jesus, ni-kmyta tyni-æn k'ma, Pæhs'hut-â timi, ni-paka-riang ymhou-an ta tnamsingan-oho. Ka ni-padarikæh-in ta Ina na tou kidi ki tælei k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus hem omkeerende ende hae? fiende sepde Zyt wel gemoet dochter uw' geloobe heeft n behonden Eii de brouwe wiert gefont ban deselbe upre af.
But Jesus turned him about, and when he saw her, he said, Daughter, be of good comfort; thy faith hath made thee whole. And the woman was made whole from that hour.
耶穌轉過來，看見她，就說：「女兒，放心！你的信救了你。」從那時候，女人就痊癒了。

S.FORM: Irou ka irouato ta ti Jesus tou talagh ki Si-bavau, ni-kytt'an tyn ta mei-paringid ki kabatoung-an-appa ka saängsang,
Irou ka irouato ta ti Jesus tou talagh ki Si-bavau, ni-kytt'an tyn ta mei-paringid ki kabatoung-an-appa ka saängsang,
S.TRANSL: Endeals Jefus in t NN top des Obeasten quam phpers ende DE wort ogh
And when Jesus came into the ruler's house, and saw the minstrels and the people making a noise,
耶穌到了管會堂的家裏，看見有吹手，又有許多人亂嚷，

S.FORM: Ni-koumma neini-æn, D'maranga, k'assi ni-mapatei ta tmat-oul, râ matta'æu-dyk merip. Ka ni-mau-ak-ak-ak mattaua tyni-æn.
Ni-koumma neini-æn, D'maranga, k'assi ni-mapatei ta tmat-oul, râ matta'æu-dyk merip. Ka ni-mau-ak-ak-ak mattaua tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: tÃ¤tÃ¢pmnm %tmkt mam het dochterKen en is niet doodt maer Hart, Ende fp belachten
He said unto them, Give place: for the maid is not dead, but sleepeth. And they laughed him to scorn.
就說：「退去吧！這閨女不是死了，是睡着了。」他們就嗤笑他。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-padarang-en tyn pa-sa-mamala ta kabatoung-an, ni-sa-rarbo, ka ni-mei-yttil tou rima tyn: ka ni-æhpit ta tmat-oul:
Irou ka ni-padarang-en tyn pa-sa-mamala ta kabatoung-an, ni-sa-rarbo, ka ni-mei-yttil tou rima tyn: ka ni-æhpit ta tmat-oul:
S.TRANSL: Als nu de schare uyt ohedreben was 1 gh hy m ende greep t:endr het dochre en font op, |26Ende dit geruchte ging nyt doo dat geheele
But when the people were put forth, he went in, and took her by the hand, and the maid arose.
眾人既被攆出，耶穌就進去，拉着閨女的手，閨女便起來了。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mæ-veiæh masouni ta kalauakau k'atta tou ymmid-appa ki pourrough k'anna.
Ka ni-mæ-veiæh masouni ta kalauakau k'atta tou ymmid-appa ki pourrough k'anna.
S.TRANSL: And the fame hereof went abroad into all that land.
於是這風聲傳遍了那地方。

S.FORM: Irou ka mali-daæua hynna ta ti Jesus, ni-mæu-æuugh tyni-æn dorouha ka mavouta tmatætææm makou-k'ma-hynna, Na Alak ti David ka harum-ou-kame.
Irou ka mali-daæua hynna ta ti Jesus, ni-mæu-æuugh tyni-æn dorouha ka mavouta tmatætææm makou-k'ma-hynna, Na Alak ti David ka harum-ou-kame.
S.TRANSL: EnEndeals Jesus ban daer boort gingh 3yn hem twee blinde gebolght roepende ende seggende [Ghy] Sone Dabids ontfermt u onser.
And when Jesus departed thence, two blind men followed him, crying, and saying, Thou son of David, have mercy on us.
耶穌從那裏往前走，有兩個瞎子跟着他，喊叫說：「大衛的子孫，可憐我們吧！」

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-mou-rbo ki tallagh, ni-iroua ta ma-vouta tyni-æn, Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Tna-msingnoumi kaua ka pailpough-en-au ta atta? Ni-koumma ta neni tyni-æn, Haei Meirang.
Ka rou ni-mou-rbo ki tallagh, ni-iroua ta ma-vouta tyni-æn, Ka ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Tna-msingnoumi kaua ka pailpough-en-au ta atta? Ni-koumma ta neni tyni-æn, Haei Meirang.
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy in huys gekomen was quamen de linde tot hem. Ende Jesus sepde tot haer Geloofc ghy dat ick dat doen kan + Sp sepden tot hem Ja Heere.
And when he was come into the house, the blind men came to him: and Jesus saith unto them, Believe ye that I am able to do this? They said unto him, Yea, Lord.
耶穌進了房子，瞎子就來到他跟前。耶穌說：「你們信我能做這事嗎？」他們說：「主啊，我們信。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ri-smoukla ki matta nein, koun, Ma-ma ki ni-tnamfingnoumi kom-'al-ato-hynna ymoumi-æn-da.
Anna ta ri-smoukla ki matta nein, koun, Ma-ma ki ni-tnamfingnoumi kom-'al-ato-hynna ymoumi-æn-da.
S.TRANSL: Doe raeckte hy hare oogen aen seggende i geichiede na uw' geloobe.
Then touched he their eyes, saying, According to your faith be it unto you.
耶穌就摸他們的眼睛，說：「照着你們的信給你們成全了吧。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-pa-rkilat ta matta nein. Ka ni-tmakou-takout ta ti Jesus mavagh neini-æn, koun, Kytt'ei ka assi 'oumha-eih timamang-da.
Ka ni-pa-rkilat ta matta nein. Ka ni-tmakou-takout ta ti Jesus mavagh neini-æn, koun, Kytt'ei ka assi 'oumha-eih timamang-da.
S.TRANSL: Ende hare oogen zijn geopent geworden. Eii Jesus heeft haer seer sfrengelick berboden seggende Siet dat het niemant en wete.
And their eyes were opened; and Jesus straitly charged them, saying, See that no man know it.
他們的眼睛就開了。耶穌切切地囑咐他們說：「你們要小心，不可叫人知道。」

S.FORM: Neni-râ dou sa-mamala, ni-pou-beiæh pou-pæ-næh ki kalauakau-an ki nanang tyn tou ymmid ki pourough k'anna.
Neni-râ dou sa-mamala, ni-pou-beiæh pou-pæ-næh ki kalauakau-an ki nanang tyn tou ymmid ki pourough k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Mae sy uptgegaen zijnde hebben hem ruchtbaer gemaeckt door dat geheele lant.
But they, when they were departed, spread abroad his fame in all that country.
他們出去，竟把他的名聲傳遍了那地方。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-sa-mamala ta neni, kytt'ei ni-ad tyni-æn ta voual ka mangoupou ka ni-ou, Lyttou.
Irou ka ni-sa-mamala ta neni, kytt'ei ni-ad tyni-æn ta voual ka mangoupou ka ni-ou, Lyttou.
S.TRANSL: Als dese nu uptgingt fiet so brachten ip cot hem een mensche die om efi ban den Duydel beseten was.
As they went out, behold, they brought to him a dumb man possessed with a devil.
他們出去的時候，有人將鬼所附的一個啞巴帶到耶穌跟前來。

S.FORM: Ka rou ni-pa-darang-en ta Lyttou, ni-masousou ta mang-oupou. Ka ni-mou-ryng-hau ta makoi-lalau-lau, koun, Myhkaqua assi-appa kytt'an ki k ma-hynna tou Israel.
Ka rou ni-pa-darang-en ta Lyttou, ni-masousou ta mang-oupou. Ka ni-mou-ryng-hau ta makoi-lalaulau, koun, Myhkaqua assi-appa kytt'an ki k ma-hynna tou Israel.
S.TRANSL: Ende als de Duybel uptgheworpen was fprack de Ctomine. Ende de scharen berwonderden haer seggende Daer en is noyt desghelicks in Ifcael gesien.
And when the devil was cast out, the dumb spake: and the multitudes marvelled, saying, It was never so seen in Israel.
鬼被趕出去，啞巴就說出話來。眾人都希奇，說：「在以色列中，從來沒有見過這樣的事。」

S.FORM: Râ ni-koumma ta Farizéen, Padarang-en tyn ta Lyttou ki Si-bavau ki Lyttou-Lyttou.
Râ ni-koumma ta Farizéen, Padarang-en tyn ta Lyttou ki Si-bavau ki Lyttou-Lyttou.
S.TRANSL: Warer Mae3 de Phariseen feyden Hy werpt de Duybelen upt door den Oberften der Duybclen.
But the Pharisees said, He casteth out devils through the prince of the devils.
法利賽人卻說：「他是靠着鬼王趕鬼。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-beiæh mou-ryt-toung ta ti Jesus ki ymmid ki mæiæuma-æuma ki keirang-en ki ka-ousing-an-appa mahtatæutæuuh tou pæui-sa-sal-an nein matta-sasou ki Hahnau ki Pei-sasou-an, simimia-appa ymmid ki maälam, ymd'-appa ki mææuahyng tou tautau-an.

Ka ni-mou-beiæh mou-ryt-toung ta ti Jesus ki ymmid ki mæiæuma-æuma ki keirang-en ki ka-ousing-an-appa mahtatæutæuuh tou pæui-sa-sal-an nein matta-sasou ki Hahnau ki Pei-sasou-an, simimia-appa ymmid ki maälam, ymd'-appa ki mææuahyng tou tautau-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesus omgingh alle de steden ende blecken leerende in haere Synagogen ende predikende het Euangelium des Koninckrijcks ende ghenesende alle fieckten ende alle qualen onde: den bolcke.
And Jesus went about all the cities and villages, teaching in their synagogues, and preaching the gospel of the kingdom, and healing every sickness and every disease among the people.
耶穌走遍各城各鄉，在會堂裏教訓人，宣講天國的福音，又醫治各樣的病症。

S.FORM: Ka dou kakytt'an tyn ta makoi-lalaulau, ni-ouhangh mara-rÿh maharum neini-æn, alei ka ni-pasi-bain ta neni pasaboak mama ki joeko ka äousi ki kmaka-ding.
Ka dou kakytt'an tyn ta makoi-lalaulau, ni-ouhangh mara-rÿh maharum neini-æn, alei ka ni-pasi-bain ta neni pasaboak mama ki joeko ka äousi ki kmaka-ding.
S.TRANSL: Ei hy de schart liende wert innerlick met ontferminge beweegt obe? haer om datse bermoeyt e berst;ont waren geliick schapen die herder nhebben,
But when he saw the multitudes, he was moved with compassion on them, because they fainted, and were scattered abroad, as sheep having no shepherd.
他看見許多的人，就憐憫他們；因為他們困苦流離，如同羊沒有牧人一般。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ki Pæhtatæutæu-en tyn, Irang ta kaäjam-in, râ matiting ta tama-iroung.
Anna ta ni-k'ma ki Pæhtatæutæu-en tyn, Irang ta kaäjam-in, râ matiting ta tama-iroung.
S.TRANSL: Doe sepde hy tot ijne Ditcipelen De ooglt 1s wel groot maer de arbepders 3yn weynige.
Then saith he unto his disciples, The harvest truly is plenteous, but the labourers are few;
於是對門徒說：「要收的莊稼多，做工的人少。

S.FORM: Anna ta tmoumimia ki Meirang ki ajam-an ka riæuri-oung-eih tyn madingi ta mai-roung-ah tou ajam-an tyn-râ. Kasasat kyttiæn ki lbæh ki soulat.
Anna ta tmoumimia ki Meirang ki ajam-an ka riæuri-oung-eih tyn madingi ta mai-roung-ah tou ajam-an tyn-râ. Kasasat kyttiæn ki lbæh ki soulat.
S.TRANSL: Bidder dan den Heere des ooglts dat hy arbeyders in shnen oogst uptstoofre.
Pray ye therefore the Lord of the harvest, that he will send forth labourers into his harvest.
所以，你們當求莊稼的主打發工人出去收他的莊稼。」
